available.name: Error Tracking System — Agent Integration
available.description: Wires the error tracking system into all IES agents and workflows — adds the rigby-error-analysis skill, Error Capture Protocol to master, Error Analysis ownership to Rigby, Shared Conventions error reporting block to all agents, and error count tracking to daily review and weekly review
changelog: Added rigby-error-analysis skill — analyzes error log for patterns, proposes tiered fixes (auto-propose for clear-cut, data-only for ambiguous), outputs daily/weekly/on-demand report formats
Added Error Reporting Protocol to agents/conventions.md — all agents now have a shared Self-Corrections reporting block with category, failure mode, and severity taxonomy
Added Error Capture Protocol to agents/master.md — Master detects and logs corrections silently, alerts on 3+ occurrence threshold patterns, defines what all sub-agents must report back
Added error analysis task and Error Log data source to agents/rigby.md — Rigby owns the full error analysis skill
Added Shared Conventions reference to agents/chief.md, chase.md, quinn.md, shep.md, harper.md, knox.md — all agents now explicitly load agents/conventions.md including the error reporting protocol
Added error tracking count step to daily review step-03 — pulls today's error count, includes in System State, notes threshold alerts in Handoffs

Added System Improvement Review (Step 8) to quinn-weekly-review — invokes error analysis logic, surfaces recurring patterns, agent performance, trend direction, and improvement proposals ready for approval

available.name: Root Audit
available.description: Adds root directory hygiene capability to Rigby — surfaces misplaced files, recommends moves or deletions, and executes after confirmation. Chains step-04-root-audit into the daily-review workflow after step-03.
changelog: New: Root Audit skill for Rigby (.claude/skills/rigby-root-audit/SKILL.md) — list, classify, confirm, execute
New: Daily review step 04 — root audit housekeeping runs after system update step
Updated: Daily review step 03 — NEXT STEP now chains to step-04-root-audit
Updated: Rigby task portfolio — Root Audit added to system block; Task Scheduling row genericized (MCP references removed from system block)
